0.title: Require hotels and similar public lodging establishments to display posters relating to human trafficking, provide for training regarding recognition of human trafficking for employees of such establishments, and limit liability for human trafficking activity at such establishments

1.last_action: Provisions/portions of LB159 amended into LB78 by AM737
1.title: Adopt the Domestic Violence and Sex Trafficking Survivor Assistance Act, change provisions relating to sentencing juveniles, and change the rate and allocation of the documentary stamp tax

2.title: Prohibit sexual abuse by a law enforcement officer

3.title: Provide additional offenses for which notification to crime victims is required

4.title: Prohibit sexual abuse of a probationer or problem solving court participant; prohibit sexual abuse by a conservator, guardian, guardian ad litem, or child welfare service provider; provide for administration of naloxone by probation employees; and change conduct constituting the offense of incest

5.title: Create the offense of commercial sexual exploitation, require registration under the Sex Offender Registration Act for certain solicitation and trafficking offenses, provide for a grant program for law enforcement, and require the Department of Health and Human Services to conduct education and awareness campaigns

6.title: Provide for termination of boards, commissions, committees, councils, funds, groups, panels, and task forces and change and eliminate funds and powers and duties of departments and agencies

7.title: Change membership provisions relating to the Crime Victim's Reparations Committee

8.last_action: Provisions/portions of LB172 amended into LB383 by AM1009
8.title: Adopt the Parental Rights in Social Media Act, rename the Child Pornography Prevention Act, and prohibit conduct involving computer-generated child pornography

9.title: Prohibit assault on a court operations officer

10.title: Prohibit assault on a pharmacist and clarify provisions relating to assault on officers, emergency responders, certain employees, and health care professionals

11.title: Prohibit assault on a frontline behavioral health provider or health care worker and clarify provisions relating to assault on officers, emergency responders, certain employees, and health care professionals

13.title: Change requirements for voluntary and informed consent and civil actions relating to abortion

14.title: Prohibit conduct involving computer-generated child pornography

15.title: Adopt the Domestic Violence and Human Trafficking Service Providers Tax Credit Act and eliminate personal property tax and sales and use tax exemptions relating to data centers

16.title: Change and eliminate provisions relating to boards, commissions, committees, task forces, and funds that terminate

17.title: Prohibit cultivated-protein food products under the Nebraska Pure Food Act and provide a deceptive trade practice

18.title: Change provisions relating to the Uniform Deceptive Trade Practices Act

19.title: Change provisions relating to the rights of victims of certain crimes

20.title: Enhance penalties for certain controlled substance offenses involving fentanyl

21.title: Change reporting requirements relating to child abuse or neglect, parental rights, and juvenile court jurisdiction

22.title: Change and eliminate reporting requirements for certain government agencies and preparation of the state executive budget and eliminate the Small Business Advisory Council, the Suggestion Award Board, and the state employee suggestion system

23.title: Change provisions of the Nebraska Mental Health Commitment Act relating to grounds for civil commitment and inpatient treatment and allow for interested parties to file petitions

24.title: Provide for and change offenses involving mobile tracking devices, stalking, unlawful intrusion, operation of unmanned aircraft systems, and swatting and eliminate the requirement that courts impose probation for Class IV felonies

25.title: Change provisions relating to the Adult Protective Services Central Registry and the Child Protection and Family Safety Act

26.title: Designate bromazolam as a controlled substance under the Uniform Controlled Substances Act, correct the spelling of certain controlled substances, and enhance penalties for certain controlled substance offenses involving fentanyl

27.title: Prohibit children from transferring to an exempt school during certain child abuse or neglect investigations and prohibit persons convicted of certain crimes from monitoring or providing instruction at such schools

28.title: Require commercial motor vehicle driver training to include antitrafficking training

29.title: Require reporting of child abuse and neglect involving military families to military authorities and military family advocacy programs

30.title: Prohibit as a deceptive trade practice certain conduct relating to assistance or referrals in veterans benefits matters

31.last_action: Banking, Commerce and Insurance AM2142 filed
31.title: Classify certain actions by a social media platform as deceptive trade practices under the Uniform Deceptive Trade Practices Act

32.title: Change and eliminate programs and services administered by the Department of Health and Human Services, eliminate various reporting requirements, and change and eliminate powers and duties of the Board of Emergency Medical Services, the Division of Children and Family Services, the Nebraska State Patrol, and the Director of Motor Vehicles

33.title: Adopt the Renewable Energy Consumer Protection Act and provide a deceptive trade practice

34.title: Provide for electronic delivery of notices and documents under the Uniform Residential Landlord and Tenant Act and the Mobile Home Landlord and Tenant Act

35.title: Adopt the Data Elimination and Limiting Extensive Tracking and Exchange Act

36.title: Recognize Karen Bowling for her service with Nebraska Family Alliance to families in Nebraska

37.title: Prohibit law enforcement officers from entering community safe spaces to enforce immigration law

38.title: Require law enforcement agencies, jails, and the Nebraska State Patrol to receive approval prior to entering into agreements to enforce immigration law

39.title: Prohibit agreements by state agencies relating to immigration enforcement without legislative approval and change provisions relating to the use of state prisons

40.title: Adopt the Nebraska Consumable Hemp Control Act

41.last_action: Provisions/portions of LB267 amended into LB80 by AM801
41.title: Adopt the Protection Orders Act, require reporting of child abuse and neglect involving military families, provide for domestic violence victims to change rental agreements and request the changing of locks, and change provisions related to landlords and tenants

42.last_action: Notice of hearing for March 05, 2026 on AM2313
42.title: Adopt the Preventing Lethal Agricultural and National Threats Act and the Critical Infrastructure Protection Act, authorize the withholding of records relating to critical water infrastructure, and provide civil and criminal penalties

43.last_action: Provisions/portions of LB694 amended into LB150 by AM1491
43.title: Adopt the Regional Mental Health Expansion Pilot Program Act, provide for a pilot program related to mental health, prohibit discrimination based on military or veteran status, and change and eliminate provisions relating to garnishment, liens, post-release supervision, sexual abuse by school workers, criminal mischief, discovery in criminal cases, habitual sentencing enhancements, veterans justice programs, paternity proceedings, handgun purchase requirements, correctional system overcrowding emergencies, the Division of Parole Services, the Nebraska Mental Health Commitment Act, and the Sex Offender Commitment Act

44.title: Adopt the Transparency in Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Act, create a fund, and change provisions relating to records which may be withheld from the public

45.title: Adopt the Domestic Violence and Human Trafficking Service Providers Tax Credit Act, change provisions related to the confidentiality of shared information, the distribution of certain tax revenue, contracts between the Tax Commissioner and collection agencies, the collection and enforcement of delinquent income tax claims, and the Mechanical Amusement Device Tax Act, provide for fees, eliminate certain personal property and sales and use tax exemptions and a tax credit, and change provisions relating to the Nebraska Advantage Research and Development Act and the ImagiNE Nebraska Act

46.title: Provide for and change transfers from the Cash Reserve Fund and provide, change, and eliminate provisions relating to fees, funds, fund transfers, agency powers and duties, and various statutory programs

47.last_action: Provisions/portions of LB228 amended into LB298 by AM1504
47.title: Provide for the Division of Legislative Oversight, the Director of Legislative Oversight, and the Legislative Oversight Committee and change provisions relating to the Public Counsel, the office of Inspector General of Nebraska Child Welfare, and the office of Inspector General of the Nebraska Correctional System

48.title: Provide, change, and eliminate provisions related to appropriations for the expenses of Nebraska State Government for the biennium ending June 30, 2027

49.last_action: Provisions/portions of LB568 amended into LB398 by AM842
49.title: Adopt updates to federal law relating to motor vehicles and motor carriers, provide for Arbor Day license plates and certain trailer license plates, change fees and fee distribution provisions for license plates and records requests related to motor vehicles and motor vehicle operators, change provisions relating to commercial driverâ€™s licenses and CLP-commercial learnerâ€™s permits, and provide duties for successors in interest of certain railroad property
